title: Multi-Customer Correlation Event
description: Emitted by the Multi-Customer Pattern Detector Coded Agent when cross-provider telemetry correlation exceeds the baseline likelihood threshold. This is the Reversal 1 trigger event — it shifts the master case goal from 'assist isolated customers' to 'determine if ClearFlow is the vector'.

source_system.description: Always the Multi-Customer Pattern Detector Coded Agent.

affected_provider_ids.description: Provider IDs showing correlated anomaly. Minimum 2 required to trigger pattern detection.

correlation_score.description: Statistical correlation score across affected providers. 0.0 = uncorrelated, 1.0 = perfectly correlated.

baseline_likelihood_pct.description: Probability (%) that this many independent anomalies within this time window are unrelated. Sub-1% triggers Reversal 1.

recommended_goal_shift.description: Text for the new master case CaseGoal variable after Reversal 1.

maestro_trigger_filter_hint.description: Paste this as the Maestro Trigger FilterTree JSON when wiring this event to a stage transition in Slice 010/012. Routes to edge_KyX7sx (Initial Response → Multi-Customer Investigation).
